description: A user reports they can no longer access a specific shared folder on the network that they could access yesterday.

nodes.task_description: Check the user's group memberships in Active Directory.

expected_outcome.value: Technician finds the user is a member of the correct security group for that drive.

nodes.task_description: Check the permissions (ACL) on the shared folder itself.

expected_outcome.value: Technician finds that the required security group was accidentally removed from the folder's permissions.

nodes.task_description: Re-add the correct security group to the folder's permissions.
